title: Evangelion 111 being re released in the UK in a Limited Edition format
display_title: Evangelion 111 being re released in the UK in a Limited Edition format
wikitext: []: Evangelion 1.11 being re-released in the UK in a Limited Edition format             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Sun Oct 30, 2016 9:20 am http://blog.alltheanime.com/newswire-93-2/ Exciting! These guys do awesome collectors editions, so this ought to be good. I suppose we could expect 2.22 and 3.33 to follow suite, and maybe a sliver of hope for NGE.
